response:
• On May 14, 2024 at 6:45 PM, a silver sedan and a black pickup truck collided at the T-intersection of Pine St. and Elm Ave. after the sedan driver failed to yield on a stop sign during light rain.  
• The sedan sustained heavy front-end damage and its driver, a 28-year-old male, complained of chest pain; the pickup’s rear bumper was crumpled and its driver, a 52-year-old female, reported neck stiffness—both were checked on scene by EMS and declined hospital transport.  
• Officer Adams cited the sedan driver for failure to yield, collected witness statements, photographed the scene, and submitted a formal police report (Case #2024-0458) for insurance and legal follow-up.
